message.content:
Implement the `LoadingSkeleton` atom for the TrendingProductsWidget in the Pigment extensions package.

## Location
`/Users/4thwithme/Documents/repo/pigment/packages/extensions/reco/TrendingProductsWidget/Atoms/LoadingSkeleton/`

Files to create:
- `LoadingSkeleton.tsx`
- `LoadingSkeleton.module.css`
- `index.ts`

## Pattern reference
Read `/Users/4thwithme/Documents/repo/pigment/docs/ai/existing-patterns/components.md` for component patterns.
Read `/Users/4thwithme/Documents/repo/pigment/packages/extensions/storefront/TestingBanner/TestingBanner.tsx` for an example of the extensions component style.

## What to implement

Port the `CarouselSkeleton` from `/Users/4thwithme/Documents/repo/catalog/app/javascript/features/TrendingProducts/components/LoadingSkeleton.jsx` (the `CarouselSkeleton` export specifically — not `BannerSkeleton`).

### Requirements
- React.forwardRef + displayName = 'LoadingSkeleton'
- NO MUI styled() — use CSS Modules only
- NO hardcoded colors — use CSS custom properties:
  - shimmer base: `var(--neutral-background-subtle)` 
  - shimmer mid (lighter): `var(--neutral-background-primary)` with some opacity blending, or just use `#f0f0f0` as a raw value if no semantic token fits (comment it)
  - Animate with @keyframes shimmer (background-position sliding left to right)
- Renders: header placeholder + 4 card placeholders in a grid
- Props: `className?: string`, `style?: React.CSSProperties`
- Use `@media (--md-up)` for responsive breakpoints (PostCSS custom media, defined in the postcss.config.js)

## Rules
- CSS modules, no MUI
- forwardRef, displayName
- No hardcoded color tokens (use var(--...) where possible)
- named exports only (no default export)

content.text: Now let me run the lint and format check to confirm the files pass:

Base directory for this skill: /Users/4thwithme/Documents/repo/pigment/.claude/skills/validating-code-changes

# Validating Code Changes

## Required Checks

Run these from the monorepo root before considering work complete:

### 1. Lint and Format
```bash
npm run lint+format:fix
```
Fixes auto-fixable issues. Review any remaining errors.

### 2. Full Validation
```bash
npm run validate
```
Must exit with code 0. Includes type checking, linting, and tests.

### 3. Storybook Verification

If applicable. Use when changing components or design tokens or stories. Not applicable if changing tests or demo apps or documentation.

Start Storybook:
```bash
npm run storybook
```

Verify:
- Command starts and serves without errors
- Check the local URL the command outputs
- Affected component stories render without errors

Story URL patterns:
- Docs: `/?path=/docs/components-{component-name}--docs`
- Story iframe: `/iframe.html?viewMode=docs&id=components-{component-name}--docs&globals=`

## Quick Reference

| Check | Command | Pass Criteria |
|-------|---------|---------------|
| Lint/Format | `npm run lint+format:fix` | No errors remaining |
| Validate | `npm run validate` | Exit code 0 |
| Storybook | `npm run storybook` | Starts, stories render |


ARGUMENTS: packages/extensions/reco/TrendingProductsWidget/Atoms/LoadingSkeleton
I'll run the validation checks now.
